<Badge text="notion-api" variant="note" /> <Badge text="19 words" variant="default" /> <Badge text="Avoid default" variant="danger" /> <Badge text="global-only-or-avoid" variant="default" />

> third-party Notion REST guide; prefer official `makenotion/skills@notion-cli` for catalog promotion.

<div class="quick-start">

### Quick Start

**Install:**
```bash
npx skills add intellectronica/agent-skills@notion-api --skill notion-api -y -g
```

**Use:** `/notion-api`

</div>

Works with [Claude Code](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code), [Gemini CLI](https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli), [OpenCode](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode), and other [agentskills.io](https://agentskills.io)-compatible agents.

<Aside type="note" title="Source & provenance">
This page is generated from curated config (`docs/src/authoring/skills/notion-api.mdx`) and local inventory when installed.
</Aside>

## Harness Coverage

Targets all supported agent harnesses via the install command below.

**Portable multi-harness install command:**
```bash
npx skills add intellectronica/agent-skills@notion-api --skill notion-api -y -g
```

## Trust / Audit

Trust tier: **Avoid default** (`global-only-or-avoid`)

Curated status: `global-only-or-avoid`

Risk notes: third-party Notion REST guide; prefer official `makenotion/skills@notion-cli` for catalog promotion.

Entry maintained in `config/external-skills.md`; provenance and audit notes are authoritative there (research context is advisory).
